heading: About the defendant’s counterclaim
infoParagraph1: You will be able to upload any evidence the defendant has on the next page.
infoParagraph2: The claimant will be able to see your answers.
counterClaimForLabel: What is the defendant’s counterclaim for?
counterClaimReasonsLabel: What are their reasons for making the counterclaim?

errors.counterClaimForRequired: Enter what the defendant’s counterclaim is for
